<!-- Replace each section with your content. Delete sections that do not apply. -->

## Summary

What does this change do? One or two sentences.

## Why

What problem does it solve, or which pre-existing decision does it implement?

## What was changed

- file paths, in bullets
- one bullet per concept
- short and concrete

## Tests

- list new or updated tests
- list any test that now passes that did not before
- note any tests skipped or marked perf

## Documentation

- list any markdown that was touched
- link to the chapter or grant template if relevant
- confirm `python3 docs/scan_non_ascii.py` still prints "OK"

## Sources for new numbers

- if you added or changed a number in `model/data/tech_params.yaml`, link the public
  source. The source must already exist as a citation key in `report/references.md`,
  or you are also adding it here.

## Disclaimer compliance

By submitting this pull request, you confirm:

- the contribution is yours, or you have the right to submit it
